entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A botanical model crop used for comparative genomic analysis

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The target crop for which genetic linkage maps are being enriched

entities.name: EST-SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers derived from expressed sequence tags

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOMICS
entities.description: The analysis of genomic structures and functions across different species

entities.name: ANGIOSPERMS
entities.description: Flowering plants, the broader group including rice and sorghum

entities.name: ORPHAN CROPS
entities.description: Underutilized crops that lack sufficient genomic tools

entities.name: RICE-SORGHUM SYNTENY
entities.description: The conserved order of genomic sequences between rice and sorghum

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist infection by the parasitic weed Striga

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A trait associated with the ability of a plant to remain green during the grain-filling stage

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought conditions at the end of the growing season

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED POPULATION
entities.description: A genetic population used for mapping markers to specific genomic regions

entities.name: IN SILICO MAPPING
entities.description: The computational process of mapping sequences onto a reference genome

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM DETECTION
entities.description: The method of identifying genetic variations between different plant entries
